dsl_rule.translation_notes: Piercing Line pattern: (1) Previous candle black = prev_close < prev_open; (2) Current candle white = close > open; (3) Current open below previous low = open < prev_low; (4) Current close above midpoint of previous body approximated as close > pivot (midpoint proxy). Exit on close below previous close (reversal confirmation).

backtest_rule.reason: Piercing Line pattern: (1) Previous candle black = prev_close < prev_open; (2) Current candle white = close > open; (3) Current open below previous low = open < prev_low; (4) Current close above midpoint of previous body approximated as close > pivot (midpoint proxy). Exit on close below previous close (reversal confirmation).

source_rule_text: Buy when a Piercing Line pattern forms (black candle followed by white candle with open below previous low and close above previous body midpoint), indicating a bullish reversal.
